2604.18348.title: AdaCluster: Adaptive Query-Key Clustering for Sparse Attention in Video Generation
2604.18348.paper_summary: Video diffusion transformers (DiTs) suffer from prohibitive inference latency due to quadratic attention complexity. Existing sparse attention methods either overlook semantic similarity or fail to adapt to heterogeneous token distributions across layers, leading to model performance degradation. We propose AdaCluster, a training-free adaptive clustering framework that accelerates the generation of DiTs while preserving accuracy. AdaCluster applies an angle-similarity-preserving clustering method to query vectors for higher compression, and designs a euclidean-similarity-preserving clustering method for keys, covering cluster number assignment, threshold-wise adaptive clustering, and efficient critical cluster selection. Experiments on CogVideoX-2B, HunyuanVideo, and Wan-2.1 on one A40 GPU demonstrate up to 1.67-4.31x speedup with negligible quality degradation.
2604.18348.paper_summary_zh: 視頻擴散Transformer（DiTs）因為二次注意力複雜度而遭受高昂的推斷延遲。現有的稀疏注意力方法要麼忽視語義相似性，要麼未能適應層之間異質的標記分佈，導致模型性能下降。我們提出了AdaCluster，一種無需訓練的自適應聚類框架，能在保持準確性的同時加速DiTs的生成。AdaCluster對查詢向量應用了一種角度相似性保持的聚類方法以實現更高的壓縮，並設計了一種歐幾里得相似性保持的聚類方法用於鍵，涵蓋了聚類數量分配、閾值自適應聚類和高效的關鍵聚類選擇。在一個A40 GPU上對CogVideoX-2B、HunyuanVideo和Wan-2.1的實驗顯示，速度提升達到1.67-4.31倍，且質量下降微乎其微。
2604.18348.author: Haoyue Tan et.al.
2604.18348.authors: Haoyue Tan, Shengnan Wang, Yulin Qiao, Juncheng Zhang, Youhui Bai, Ping Gong, Zewen Jin, Cheng Li
